overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the Megabuilding H7 transit station in Santo Domingo. The player moves along a covered platform with views of the industrial cityscape outside, passing NPCs and vending machines in a dystopian cyberpunk setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit platform with city views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the platform, observing the futuristic cityscape through large glass windows

entered.detail: large red industrial sign with white text reading MEGABUILDING H7 SANTO DOMINGO mounted on metal beams
futuristic urban buildings and infrastructure visible through floor-to-ceiling glass windows
teal colored metal benches covered in graffiti and stickers
scattered paper, cans, and garbage littering the concrete platform floor
wide concrete walkway with white painted directional arrows and markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered transit platform inside Megabuilding H7, with a large red sign identifying the location. The player walks forward along the concrete platform, passing teal benches and scattered trash, while the futuristic Santo Domingo cityscape is visible through large glass windows to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit platform with vending machines and pedestrian activity

events.description: camera turns slightly right to navigate around NPCs standing near the vending machine

agents.ego_description: continuing along the platform while navigating past pedestrians congregating near vending machines

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing and conversing near a blue vending machine
person standing on top of a structure overlooking the platform

entered.detail: teal colored vending machine with graffiti tags and illuminated digital interface
bright red vending machine with glowing advertisements and product displays
industrial metal staircase with railings leading to an upper level

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking along the platform, passing NPCs gathered near teal and red vending machines. The Megabuilding H7 sign moves behind as the camera advances toward a metal staircase structure, with the cityscape still visible through the windows.

events.description: view opens up to reveal large industrial cooling towers and factory district outside the windows

agents.ego_description: approaching the staircase area and observing the industrial landscape visible through the windows

entered.detail: three massive concrete cooling towers emitting steam in the industrial district
dense industrial complex with smokestacks and manufacturing facilities
double-width metal staircase with industrial railings leading to upper walkway

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the staircase area where the view opens up to reveal an industrial district with massive cooling towers visible through the windows. The Megabuilding H7 sign appears on the left as the camera moves past the vending machines and approaches the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with panoramic industrial views

events.description: camera turns left to look down the length of the platform toward the industrial view

agents.ego_description: pausing to look at the industrial cooling towers and factory district, then continuing along the upper platform

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
mountain range visible behind the industrial complex in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the upper platform, looking out at the industrial cooling towers and factory district with mountains in the background. The camera turns to look down the length of the platform, showing the railing and the expansive view of the industrial Santo Domingo district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a covered transit platform that gradually reveals an expansive industrial skyline. It begins by walking past a large red Megabuilding H7 sign and teal benches, with the futuristic Santo Domingo cityscape visible through large glass windows to the left. As the camera advances, the scene shifts past groups of NPCs and colorful vending machines, moving steadily toward a metal staircase structure. The view then opens up as the camera reaches the stairs, transitioning from the enclosed platform to a wider vista of massive cooling towers and a factory district. Finally, the camera turns to look down the length of the railing, capturing the full scale of the industrial district set against a backdrop of distant mountains.
